scripts.lint: vp exec vize lint --preset happy-path src
scripts.dev: vp run build:bindings && vp dev --configLoader runner
scripts.build: vp run build:bindings && vp build --configLoader runner
scripts.vize:check: vp run vize:lint && vp run vize:_check
scripts.vize:_check: vp exec vize check --tsconfig tsconfig.json src
scripts.vize:lint: vp run vize:lint:opinionated && vp run vize:lint:strict-reactivity
scripts.vize:lint:opinionated: vp exec vize lint --preset opinionated --help-level short src
scripts.vize:lint:ci: vp exec vize lint --preset essential --max-warnings 0 src
